timeZone.description: IANA time zone used to determine dates and hours for commit grouping (default: UTC)

concurrency.description: Number of concurrent API requests during sync

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries for failed API requests

pageSize.description: Number of items per page for GraphQL pagination (default: 50)

rateLimitGracePeriod.description: Grace period in milliseconds added when waiting for rate limit reset (default: 1000)

recheckWithRemainingRateLimit.description: Recheck branches for new commits using remaining rate limit after initial sync (default: false)

skip.description: Repositories and organizations to skip during sync

exclude.description: Repositories to exclude from aggregated stats (still synced for data completeness). Use 'owner/repo' for public repos or 'sha256:<hash>' for private repos where the hash is the SHA-256 hex digest of 'owner/repo'
